title: Modern Waystones Textures
description: A remake of few items in Waystones mod to be akin of vanilla Minecraft.
body:
![Texturepack](https://i.imgur.com/H4BrFi9.png)
![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/l6wYCY9.png)

A recreation of the item textures used in the [Waystones mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) developed by [Blay](https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth), which were created by [@JoeCreates](https://twitter.com/JoeCreates) (gem and scroll). The assets were released under the CC-BY-SA 3.0 license [here](https://opengameart.org/content/roguelikerpg-items).

I created these textures to be personal use only, but I decided to share my work. 

This resourcepack changes the appearance of few items which are: Warp Dust, Warp Stone, Warp Plate, Attuned Shard (and its crumbling variant) and all 3 scrolls.
